title: Xbox is testing ad-supported game streaming. Amazon is folding Luna into Prime Video. Both admit cloud gaming has not worked yet.
excerpt: Microsoft and Amazon announced new cloud gaming strategies on the same day, each acknowledging in different ways that the category has not reached the audience they expected. Xbox will test ad-supported game streaming, letting users in its Insider Programme stream games they already own for free with a one-hour session limit and advertising. Amazon is […]
content_html:
TL;DR

Xbox is testing ad-supported cloud game streaming. Amazon is integrating Luna into Prime Video for all Prime subscribers. Both are pivoting after years of low cloud gaming adoption.

Microsoft and Amazon announced new cloud gaming strategies on the same day, each acknowledging in different ways that the category has not reached the audience they expected. Xbox will test ad-supported game streaming, letting users in its Insider Programme stream games they already own for free with a one-hour session limit and advertising. Amazon is moving Luna into Prime Video, adding a “Games” tab alongside Movies, TV Shows, and Sports for all Prime subscribers.

Xbox’s approach borrows from Netflix’s playbook. Netflix’s ad-supported tier picked up tens of millions of users by lowering the price barrier. Xbox is applying the same logic to cloud gaming: if people will not pay for a streaming subscription, maybe they will watch an ad to play a game they already bought. The company has not created an ad-supported Game Pass tier, but this test moves in that direction. Xbox CEO Asha Sharma, who replaced Phil Spencer in February, has cut subscription prices, announced a next-generation console for 2027, and this month laid off 20% of the division’s workforce.

Amazon’s pivot is simpler: Luna was invisible, so Amazon is putting it where people already are. The service had “millions” of users across 14 countries but suffered from an awareness gap. Gaming head Jeff Gattis told CNBC the company is not trying to compete with PlayStation, Xbox, or Steam. “Gamers are well-served, if not overserved,” he said. Amazon is targeting casual players who want to try Harry Potter or Tomb Raider without buying a console. Google tried the same bet with Stadia and shut it down in 2023.

Cloud gaming’s fundamental problem remains latency. No amount of business model innovation changes the physics of streaming interactive content over inconsistent internet connections. Google rebuilt Search around AI after admitting its old approach was not working, and both Xbox and Amazon are making similar admissions about cloud gaming by abandoning their original strategies. Users moved to alternatives when Google changed too aggressively, and the risk for Xbox is that ads in game streaming trigger the same backlash that forced EA and Take-Two to remove in-game advertising after player outrage.

content_html_zh:
TL;DR

Xbox 正在测试支持广告的云游戏流媒体。 亚马逊正在将 Luna 整合到所有 Prime 订阅者的 Prime Video 中。 经过多年的云游戏采用率较低之后，两者都在转型。

微软和亚马逊在同一天宣布了新的云游戏战略，各自以不同的方式承认该类别尚未达到他们预期的受众群体。 Xbox 将测试广告支持的游戏流媒体，让参与其 Insider Program 的用户免费流媒体播放他们已经拥有的游戏，但有一小时的会话限制和广告。 亚马逊正在将 Luna 转移到 Prime Video 中，为所有 Prime 订阅者在电影、电视节目和体育旁边添加“游戏”选项卡。

Xbox 的方法借鉴了 Netflix 的剧本。 Netflix 的广告支持层通过降低价格门槛吸引了数千万用户。 Xbox 将同样的逻辑应用于云游戏：如果人们不支付流媒体订阅费用，也许他们会观看广告来玩他们已经购买的游戏。 该公司尚未创建支持广告的 Game Pass 等级，但此次测试正朝着这个方向发展。 Xbox 首席执行官阿莎·夏尔马 (Asha Sharma) 在 2 月份取代了菲尔·斯宾塞 (Phil Spencer)，他降低了订阅价格，宣布将于 2027 年推出下一代游戏机，并于本月解雇了该部门 20% 的员工。

亚马逊的转型更简单：Luna 是隐形的，所以亚马逊将它放在人们已经在的地方。 该服务在 14 个国家拥有“数百万”用户，但存在认知差距。 游戏主管 Jeff Gattis 告诉 CNBC，该公司无意与 PlayStation、Xbox 或 Steam 竞争。 “游戏玩家得到了很好的服务，即使不是过度服务，”他说。 亚马逊的目标客户是那些想在不购买游戏机的情况下尝试《哈利·波特》或《古墓丽影》的休闲玩家。 谷歌在 Stadia 上尝试了同样的赌注，并于 2023 年将其关闭。

云游戏的根本问题仍然是延迟。 再多的商业模式创新也无法改变通过不一致的互联网连接流式传输交互式内容的物理原理。 谷歌在承认其旧方法行不通后围绕人工智能重建了搜索，Xbox 和亚马逊也放弃了原来的策略，对云游戏做出了类似的承认。 当 Google 改变过于激进时，用户就会转向替代方案，而 Xbox 面临的风险是，游戏流媒体中的广告会引发同样的强烈抵制，迫使 EA 和 Take-Two 在玩家愤怒后删除游戏内广告。
